Tips: The usage time of a fully charged laptop depends on a number of factors, including battery capacity, usage environment and intensity of use. It also depends on the user's utilisation. If the device is used to play high-resolution videos, play extensive games or for intensive work, the battery life will be considerably shorter. If it is only used for light work such as surfing the Internet, editing documents, etc., the battery life may be longer.
description: Product Description Compatibile con la batteria originale: C21N1818-1 for Asus VivoBook 15 F512 F512D F512DA F512F F512FA F512FB F512FJ F512FL F512J F512JA Series for Asus VivoBook 15 S512 S512D S512DA S512DK S512F S512FA S512FB S512FL S512FJ Series for Asus VivoBook 15 A512 A512D A512DA A512F A512FA A512FB A512FL A512J A512JA A512JP Series -Battery won't hold a charge, how to fix it? Remove the battery for a while. Insert the battery and charge it fully using the charger. Disconnect the charger and let the battery discharge to turn it off. Repeat the charging and discharging process at least three times. Please charge the battery when the power is below 20%. If available, connect the AC charger when working on the computer. -Battery suddenly dies at around 20%, how to fix it? Unplug the power cord. Remove the battery. Press and hold the power button for 30 seconds, then release it for 30 seconds, then press and hold it again for another 30 seconds. Plug in the device, replace the battery, and turn on the laptop. Why did my computer not recognize this battery? The reason is the residual power stored in the laptop components, which prevented the battery from functioning properly. Please disconnect the old battery and hold down the power button for 20 seconds. Then connect the new battery. This will consume the residual or flea current, and the battery will function properly after reassembling the laptop. Make sure that you have the correct battery. New batteries must be fully charged and discharged two to three times before they are fully functional. Only after two or three complete charge and discharge cycles will a new battery be able to utilise its full charge and service life. Do not leave the computer in a low-power or no-power state for a long period of time, when the remaining power is about 20%, please connect the power supply in time. Charge and discharge the battery once a month, disconnect the power supply, use the battery power up to 20-30% remaining power to keep the battery active. If the computer is not used for a long time, keep the power supply of the computer at about 80% before switching it off, and try to charge the battery from time to time.
